title: Asset (सम्पत्ति / Sampatti)
content:
Professional: Resource owned/controlled with economic value; current (cash, bank, inventory, receivable) or non-current (land, furniture, machinery).
Nepali: सम्पत्ति = व्यापारको हातमा मूल्य भएको चीज — सामान, नगद, बैंक, फर्निचर, ग्राहकले दिनु पर्ने पैसा।
Roman: pasal ma saman=inventory; bank ma jamma=bank; haatma naqad=cash; udhaaro diye ko paisa=debtor.
Journal: Asset increase=DEBIT; decrease=CREDIT. Example furniture Rs 15000 cash: Dr Furniture, Cr Cash.
Ambiguity: maal kinareko = inventory vs fixed asset vs drawings. Ask: bechna ko lagi ki use garna?
Mistakes: Don't classify all purchases as inventory; debtor is asset; advance to supplier is asset not expense.
source: Nepal Accounting KB Phase 1 (AI Training — verify tax/legal with IRD/CA)

title: Liability (दायित्व / Daayitwa)
content:
Professional: Present obligation; loans, payables, VAT/TDS payable, advance from customers.
Nepali: अरुलाई तिर्नु पर्ने — साहुको उधारो, बैंक ऋण, भ्याट।
Roman: sahule dinu pareko=creditor; graahakle advance diyeko=advance liability.
Journal: Liability increase=CREDIT. Credit purchase Rs 20000: Dr Purchase, Cr Accounts Payable.
Mistakes: Advance from customer is NOT income; VAT collected is liability; loan principal repayment is NOT expense.
source: Nepal Accounting KB Phase 1 (AI Training — verify tax/legal with IRD/CA)

title: Capital (पूँजी / Punji)
content:
Owner's equity = Assets - Liabilities. Owner investment + profit - drawings.
Roman: pasal suru garda haale=capital introduced; nafa le punji baddha.
Journal: Owner invests: Dr Cash/Bank, Cr Capital. NOT income.
Ask: firtaa dinu parchha ki pardaina? (loan vs capital)
source: Nepal Accounting KB Phase 1 (AI Training — verify tax/legal with IRD/CA)

title: Owner Drawings (झिकाइ)
content:
Owner withdrawal for personal use. Reduces equity. NOT business expense.
Roman: ghar kharcha ko lagi byapar bata nikaale=drawings.
Journal: Dr Drawings, Cr Cash. NEVER record ghar kharcha as expense.
source: Nepal Accounting KB Phase 1 (AI Training — verify tax/legal with IRD/CA)

title: Income / Revenue (आम्दानी)
content:
Inflow from ordinary activities — sales, service, rent, interest.
Journal cash sale Rs 10000: Dr Cash, Cr Sales. With VAT: Dr Cash 11300, Cr Sales 10000, Cr VAT Output 1300.
Mistakes: VAT is NOT income; advance is NOT sales; collecting debtor is NOT new income.
source: Nepal Accounting KB Phase 1 (AI Training — verify tax/legal with IRD/CA)

title: Expense (खर्च / Kharcha)
content:
Costs reducing profit — rent, salary, utilities, transport, repair.
Roman: bhada tireko=rent; batti bill=electricity; kharcha gareko=vague — always ask which expense.
Journal rent Rs 15000: Dr Rent Expense, Cr Cash. Rent may need TDS — verify IRD/CA.
source: Nepal Accounting KB Phase 1 (AI Training — verify tax/legal with IRD/CA)

title: Purchase (खरिद / Kharid)
content:
Buying goods for resale — NOT fixed assets.
Roman: maal kinareko, sahubata maal liyeko, stock bhareko.
Journal cash purchase Rs 50000: Dr Purchase, Cr Cash. Credit with VAT: Dr Purchase, Dr VAT Input, Cr Creditor.
source: Nepal Accounting KB Phase 1 (AI Training — verify tax/legal with IRD/CA)

title: Sales (बिक्री / Bikri)
content:
Revenue when goods/services transferred.
Roman: maal gayo, becheko, udharo ma bikri.
Journal credit sale Rs 15000+VAT: Dr Debtor 16950, Cr Sales 15000, Cr VAT Output 1950.
Ambiguity: paisa aayo may be new sale OR collection of old credit.
source: Nepal Accounting KB Phase 1 (AI Training — verify tax/legal with IRD/CA)

title: Cash (नगद / Naqad)
content:
Physical currency — most liquid asset.
Roman: haatma paisa, naqad tireko, cash ma liyeko.
Journal receive Rs 5000: Dr Cash, Cr Sales/Receivable.
source: Nepal Accounting KB Phase 1 (AI Training — verify tax/legal with IRD/CA)

title: Bank & Digital Wallets
content:
Bank, cheque, NEFT, eSewa, Khalti, FonePay, ConnectIPS, QR.
Roman: bank ma jamma, esewa bata aayo, khalti le tireko.
Journal eSewa receipt: Dr Bank/eSewa, Cr Sales/Receivable.
source: Nepal Accounting KB Phase 1 (AI Training — verify tax/legal with IRD/CA)

title: Debtor / Accounts Receivable
content:
Customers who haven't paid — current asset.
Roman: udharo diyeko, graahakle pachi dincha, Ramle dinu chha.
Credit sale: Dr Debtor, Cr Sales. Payment: Dr Cash, Cr Debtor — NOT new sales.
source: Nepal Accounting KB Phase 1 (AI Training — verify tax/legal with IRD/CA)

title: Creditor / Accounts Payable
content:
Suppliers owed payment — current liability.
Roman: udharo ma maal liyeko, sahuko paisa baki.
Credit purchase: Dr Purchase, Cr Creditor. Payment: Dr Creditor, Cr Cash.
source: Nepal Accounting KB Phase 1 (AI Training — verify tax/legal with IRD/CA)
